commands.review_summary:
The PR widens Azure Responses stream parsing to accept `text` content parts and `response.text.delta` events in the shared provider parser and active OpenClaw transport, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +371. Total +429 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, but not live-reproduced here: current main drops the claimed Azure event sequence in source, while the linked issue provides detailed live symptoms. The after-fix real Azure canary is still missing.

target.title: fix: support Azure Responses text stream events
target.body:
## Summary

Companion/follow-up to #88893 for #88833. This branch addresses the code/test blockers called out on #88893 while preserving the same Azure Responses compatibility goal.

Changes:
- accept Azure Responses `text` content parts alongside OpenAI `output_text` in the shared parser;
- handle Azure `response.text.delta` in both parser paths;
- update `src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts` so the active Azure Responses transport path does not drop the same Azure stream shape;
- keep the SDK client/request seam typed to SDK `ResponseStreamEvent` and widen only the parser input to a narrow Azure-compatible event union;
- make streaming tests feed one continuous event sequence through `processResponsesStream`; and
- add coverage for Azure text deltas emitted without a preceding `response.content_part.added` event.

## Validation

Run locally on Windows with pnpm 11.2.2:

```text
npm exec --yes pnpm@11.2.2 -- test -- src/llm/providers/openai-responses-shared.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts
npm exec --yes pnpm@11.2.2 -- tsgo:core
npm exec --yes pnpm@11.2.2 -- tsgo:test:src
```

Focused test result: `src/llm/providers/openai-responses-shared.test.ts` 10 tests passed; `src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts` 228 tests passed.

## Proof status

Draft on purpose: this does **not** add the missing redacted live Azure/OpenClaw canary proof requested on #88893. It only supplies the source and regression-test side of the review findings. Happy to close this if #88893 is updated/cherry-picked instead.

## Related

- #88893
- Fixes #88833 if completed with live proof/maintainer acceptance.
